description: Kafka 4.x KRaft fleet and cluster operations dashboard built on Kafka JMX, kafka_exporter 1.9.0, node metrics, alerts, and VictoriaLogs. Select cls=All for the global fleet view.

panels.description: Kafka clusters in the selected scope.

targets.expr: count(count by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Clusters

panels.description: Share of kafka_exporter targets currently reachable.

targets.expr: (sum(up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) / clamp_min(count(up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}), 1)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Exporter Health

targets.expr: sum(max by (cls) (kafka_brokers{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})) or on() vector(0)
count(count by (cls, topic) (kafka_topic_partitions{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})) or on() vector(0)
sum(max by (cls, topic) (kafka_topic_partitions{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})) or on() vector(0)
count(count by (cls, consumergroup) (kafka_consumergroup_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Total approximate lag after deduplicating identical exporter views.

targets.expr: sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Total Lag

targets.expr: count(ALERTS{alertstate="firing",category="kafka",cls=~"$cls"}) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Healthy requires every exporter to be reachable, broker metadata to be available, and zero leaderless or under-replicated partitions.

targets.expr: max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) * on (cls) ((max by (cls) (kafka_brokers{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) > bool 0) * on (cls) ((sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) == bool 0) * on (cls) ((sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) < bool 0) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) == bool 0)

panels.title: Cluster Health

panels.description: One card per kafka_exporter target. Click an instance for detailed metadata and host resource analysis.

targets.expr: up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}

panels.title: Kafka Exporters

panels.description: Partitions whose reported leader broker ID is negative.

targets.expr: sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) < bool 0) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Leaderless

targets.expr: sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})) or on() vector(0)
sum(1 - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader_is_preferred{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})) or on() vector(0)

sum(clamp_min(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_replicas{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_in_sync_replica{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}), 0)) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Sum of log-end minus oldest offsets. This is an offset span, not an exact record count for compacted topics.

targets.expr: sum(clamp_min(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_oldest_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}), 0)) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Offset Span

targets.expr: sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_members{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",consumergroup=~"$group"})) or on() vector(0)

panels.description: Replication and leadership health over time after deduplicating exporter views.

targets.expr: sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))
sum(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) < bool 0)
sum(1 - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader_is_preferred{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))

sum(clamp_min(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_replicas{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_in_sync_replica{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}), 0))

panels.title: Partition Reliability

panels.description: Partition leader count per broker ID; uneven distributions reveal leadership skew.

targets.expr: count_values by (cls) ("broker", max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) >= 0)

panels.title: Leader Distribution

panels.description: Observed log-end offset growth and consumer committed-offset progress. Commit progress is not broker network throughput.

targets.expr: sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (clamp_min(rate(kafka_topic_partition_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}[5m]), 0)))
sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (clamp_min(rate(kafka_consumergroup_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"}[5m]), 0)))

panels.title: Append / Commit Progress

panels.description: Top consumer groups by approximate total lag.

targets.expr: topk($topk, sum by (cls, consumergroup) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})))

panels.title: Consumer Lag by Group

panels.description: Operational summary by logical Kafka cluster.

targets.expr: max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) * on (cls) ((max by (cls) (kafka_brokers{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) > bool 0) * on (cls) ((sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) == bool 0) * on (cls) ((sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}) < bool 0) or on (cls) (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))) == bool 0)
count by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})
max by (cls) (kafka_brokers{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})
count by (cls) (max by (cls, topic) (kafka_topic_partitions{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))
sum by (cls) (max by (cls, topic) (kafka_topic_partitions{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))
count by (cls) (count by (cls, consumergroup) (kafka_consumergroup_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"}))
sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_members{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",consumergroup=~"$group"}))
sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"}))
sum by (cls) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))
sum by (cls) (1 - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader_is_preferred{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}))
sum by (cls) (ALERTS{alertstate="firing",category="kafka",cls=~"$cls"}) or (0 * max by (cls) (up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}))

panels.title: Cluster Summary

panels.description: Broker IDs and advertised addresses reported by kafka_exporter.

targets.expr: max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_broker_info{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"})

panels.title: Broker Directory

panels.description: Topic partitioning, replication, leadership, offset span, and append progress. RF is the maximum replica count; MinISR is the minimum observed in-sync replica count.

targets.expr: label_join(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partitions{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(max by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_replicas{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(min by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_in_sync_replica{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_under_replicated_partition{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (1 - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_leader_is_preferred{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_oldest_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")

label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (clamp_min(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}) - max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_topic_partition_oldest_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}), 0)), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")
label_join(sum by (cls, topic) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (clamp_min(rate(kafka_topic_partition_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic"}[5m]), 0))), "key", " / ", "cls", "topic")

panels.title: Topic Inventory

panels.description: Consumer membership, committed offsets, progress, and lag. Empty when the cluster has no consumer groups.

targets.expr: label_join(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_members{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",consumergroup=~"$group"}), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

label_join(count by (cls, consumergroup) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

label_join(sum by (cls, consumergroup) (clamp_min(max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_current_offset_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"}), 0)), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

label_join(sum by (cls, consumergroup) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

label_join(max by (cls, consumergroup) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (kafka_consumergroup_lag{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"})), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

label_join(sum by (cls, consumergroup) (max without (ins, ip, instance) (clamp_min(rate(kafka_consumergroup_current_offset{job="$job",cls=~"$cls",topic=~"$topic",consumergroup=~"$group"}[5m]), 0))), "key", " / ", "cls", "consumergroup")

panels.title: Consumer Group Inventory

panels.description: Reachability timeline for each kafka_exporter target.

targets.expr: up{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}

panels.title: Exporter Availability

panels.description: Exporter process CPU, goroutines, and OS threads.

targets.expr: rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}[5m])
go_goroutines{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}
go_threads{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}

panels.title: Exporter Runtime

panels.description: Exporter memory footprint, scrape latency, and sample volume.

targets.expr: process_resident_memory_bytes{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}
go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}
scrape_duration_seconds{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}
scrape_samples_scraped{job="$job",cls=~"$cls"}

panels.title: Exporter Memory / Scrape Cost

panels.description: Kafka service log events grouped by severity.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:kafka OR app:kafka) | stats by (level) count() as count

panels.title: Kafka Log Volume

panels.description: kafka_exporter log events grouped by severity.

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:kafka_exporter OR app:kafka_exporter) | stats by (level) count() as count

panels.title: Exporter Log Volume

targets.expr: job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:kafka OR app:kafka) | fields level,ip,unit,_msg
job:syslog ip:in(${members:doublequote}) (unit:kafka_exporter OR app:kafka_exporter) | fields level,ip,unit,_msg

title: Kafka Overview
